name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: Columbus, OH's PLS Check Cashers at 2724 Cleveland Ave offers 24-hour check cashing and cash services.
description_long:
PLS Check Cashers operates at 2724 Cleveland Ave in Columbus, OH as a standalone 24-hour location. The storefront welcomes customers around the clock, seven days a week, making it a reliable option for Columbus residents and visitors who need immediate access to check cashing services at any hour. Whether you're a shift worker, traveler, or someone who can't reach your bank during traditional hours, this Columbus location is designed for your convenience.

At this 2724 Cleveland Ave location in Columbus, you can cash checks, send money transfers, and access other fast cash services. Call +1 614-262-1766 to confirm specific services, rates, or to ask questions before visiting. The staff is trained to process transactions quickly while verifying your identity.

When visiting PLS Check Cashers in Columbus, bring a valid government-issued ID and your check or documentation for the service you need. The 24-hour availability means you're never locked out by banking hours, which is particularly valuable for urgent financial needs in the Columbus area.
pros: Open 24/7 — all service categories available around the clock, including nights and weekends
Ria Money Transfer available in-store for international and domestic remittances
Illinois vehicle services (registration, title transfers, license plates, city stickers) handled on-site
Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard issued in-store with a companion mobile app
Notary services available for wills, deeds, trusts, power of attorney, and other legal documents
Foreign currency exchange available for international travelers or immigrants
Government benefit check processing available alongside standard check cashing
cons: No fee information disclosed anywhere on the website — check cashing rates and money order costs are opaque
No personal loans, lines of credit, or any credit products offered
No FDIC-insured savings or interest-bearing accounts — Xpectations card is prepaid, not a bank account
Only operates in 12 states — not available to most of the US
As an alternative financial services provider, costs for routine transactions likely exceed those at a bank or credit union
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate check cashing at any hour
Illinois residents needing vehicle registration or title transfers outside standard DMV hours
Immigrants or workers needing to send money internationally via Ria Money Transfer
Consumers needing notary services, bill pay, or phone top-ups in a single stop
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate financial services — especially check cashing, bill pay, or international transfers — outside of standard banking hours. The 24/7 availability and Illinois vehicle services make it unusually convenient, but consumers should ask for the full fee schedule upfront, as no pricing is disclosed on the website and alternative financial services fees can be significantly higher than bank equivalents.
meta_description: Columbus, OH: PLS Check Cashers at 2724 Cleveland Ave. Open 24 hours for check cashing, money transfers, and fast cash services.
